advancedDialog.title: Kalman Filter - Advanced
advancedDialog.processNoiseDescription: Higher Q follows rapid signal variations. Lower Q produces stronger smoothing.
advancedDialog.measurementNoiseDescription: Higher R removes more measurement noise. Lower R responds faster to changes.

messages.missingValues: Please enter both Q and R values.
messages.invalidValues: Q and R must be positive numbers.
messages.missingKalmanValues: Custom preset selected but no Q/R values were entered.
